description_long: This is a well-worn, brown stuffed toy resembling a bear, with a slightly lopsided head and a soft, textured surface. The toy's fur appears matted and aged, with visible seams and some irregularities in the stuffing, giving it a vintage or handmade appearance. Its facial features are simple, with small, dark eyes and a subtle snout, while the ears are rounded and slightly asymmetrical. The arms and legs are elongated and loosely attached, contributing to a relaxed, slouchy posture. The back of the toy shows more pronounced creasing and wear, indicating frequent handling or hugging. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the toy, and its overall look suggests it is a cherished, well-loved companion.
description: A vintage, brown stuffed bear toy with a worn, textured surface and simple facial features. Its limbs are loosely attached, and the toy shows signs of age and frequent use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face, rounded ears, and slightly tilted head with both arms and legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, snout, and the elongated arm and leg on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and legs, with visible creases and seam lines.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bear's profile, with the right arm and leg more prominent and the ear shape visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with small, dark eyes and a subtle, closed snout. There are no pronounced eyebrows or mouth, giving it a calm and slightly melancholic appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms relaxed at the sides and legs slightly apart, the head is slightly tilted to one side.
